entry.title: Arkenfox installation guide
entry.content: Arkenfox user.js is a configuration file for desktop Firefox designed to increase the privacy and security of the browser while avoiding making the browser unusable. This guide will walk you through how to install it and later explain some use cases and alternatives.

entry.title: Test post
entry.content: This is my first post in the brand new soupault blog. It’s really interesting, except for its introductory paragraph of course.
